art_a: The sentence is a question (ends with '?').
art_b: Every word in the sentence starts with the same letter.
FF: I made coffee before work today.
She walked her dog around the block.
We watched a movie last night.
The kids played outside until dark.
He fixed the broken kitchen sink.
My sister baked fresh bread this morning.
They drove to the beach early.
I forgot my keys at home.
The cat slept on the warm couch.
We planted flowers near the fence.
She read a book by the window.
He cooked dinner for his family.
The rain fell softly all afternoon.
I cleaned my room before lunch.
They sang songs around the campfire.
My brother washed the dirty dishes.
We hiked up the steep hill.
She painted the old wooden chair.
The teacher explained the new lesson.
He parked his truck near the store.
I bought some apples at the market.
They built a treehouse last summer.
The dog barked at passing cars.
We shared a pizza after school.
TF: Where did you put my keys?
How was your day at work?
Can you help me with this?
What time should we leave today?
Are you coming to the party?
Why did she leave so early?
Did you eat breakfast this morning?
Who is going to drive us home?
Have you seen my blue jacket?
When does the next train arrive?
Could you pass me the salt?
Is it raining outside right now?
